# “We step out of the shade of flame and unafraid...” —Amanda Gorman
My Friend,
Today, we breathe a sigh of relief as Joe Biden became the 46th President and Kamala Harris was sworn in as the first mom Vice President (among her other amazing firsts). Now that all of the collective hard work for the last few years has seen us flip the House, Senate, and the White House, real change to help moms and families is possible.
We learned from the successes in Georgia that there are no off years in politics. Here at Moms in Office, we’re celebrating with you today. And then we’re getting to work. We’ll be doing some exciting things this year to work towards the goals of electing more moms and advocating for policies that support all moms and families.Like so many of you, we feel like today truly marks the beginning of the potential of this new year.Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in OfficeP.S. All of the exciting things we’re working on mean we do need [**your help**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b7dd05da16&e=3f151f8b74).

name: =?utf-8?Q?White=20House=20Press=20Office?=
subject: PRESS RELEASE: ACCEPTANCE ON BEHALF OF THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
body:
| | |
---
| | January 20, 2021
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE **
January 20, 2020 **ACCEPTANCE ON BEHALF OF THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA**
I, Joseph R. Biden Jr., President of the United States of America, having seen and considered the Paris Agreement, done at Paris on December 12, 2015, do hereby accept the said Agreement and every article and clause thereof on behalf of the United States of America.

Done at Washington this 20th day of January, 2021.
JOSEPH R. BIDEN JR.

###
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Conservative Values Are Tennessee Values
body:
Peter,On January 3rd of this year, I placed my left hand on the Bible and raised my right hand to be sworn in as your new U.S. Senator. On that day, I took an oath to defend and protect our United States Constitution, and I take that oath to heart.

As I fight to protect our conservative Tennessee values, I'll stand up against the Democrats' socialist agenda of packing the Supreme Court, implementing the Green New Deal and government-run health care and kowtowing to Communist China. They want to turn America into a socialist nation.

I won't let them. As your Senator, I will continue to work alongside Senator Marsha Blackburn and represent the conservative principles you elected me to protect. Conservative values are Tennessee values, and your voice will be heard.Best,Bill Hagerty

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: My Statement on Inauguration Day
body:
| | | |
---
| **My Statement On Inauguration Day**
---
| | | **I want to thank President Donald Trump for his tremendous service to our country. His tireless defense of unborn children, religious freedom, small businesses, our free economy, victims of human-trafficking, immigration law, and much more, was incredibly needed and timely for America. I am thankful for his defense of Israel, his peace through strength foreign policy against evil regimes, his historic mideast peace accords between Israel and multiple neighbors, his fight against corruption in career politicians and government officials, his supreme court nominations, as well as his leadership to bring jobs back to the U.S. and move the economy forward for all—especially with minorities and women. **
**President Trump, while many did not appreciate your leadership over the last four years, or understand all of the facts around your actions and accomplishments, you were a blessing to America, and you will be missed. Thank you. **
**I would like to wish President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris all of the best. I will be praying for them every day while they are in office, and that they lead America with righteousness, justice, and compassion—especially towards the unborn and victims of human-trafficking. ** **I pray that they would love mercy, do justice, and walk humbly before God every day. **
**I believe America’s best days are still ahead and I that God’s favor is still upon this country. **
**May God Bless America.**
**-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=957ecba438&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=d2f469d25e&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

subject: The moment to defend and and strengthen our democracy

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oJ47XcSlShk13ZZXxdtYHKLNZB1tDZyPYzTccZ4ei2Q=/IZh3PVrjuwVIJYZ3C-2Ql-m8Nn55oQ4rtBw4JY-Avq8=?refcode=012121)
| | Friend,
This is a make or break moment for democracy. Two weeks ago, we all witnessed the dangerous consequences of months and years of efforts to undermine our democracy and overturn the will of the voters. To meet the challenge of this moment, we must respond with urgency to repair and build a stronger, more inclusive democracy where everyone thrives. Here's how House DFLers are working to stand up for our democracy and Minnesota voters:
* **Defend voters and institutions** by tackling voter intimidation & harassment, preventing deceptive practices, and stopping disinformation.
* **Repair our democracy** by reducing the racial, generational and regional disparities in our elections.
* **Strengthen our democracy** by expanding access to the ballot and empowering voters.

It's Minnesotans who make our democracy work and we are working to ensure that democracy works for every Minnesotan. One of the ways we can work together to diminish the power of outside money in politics is by taking advantage of the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund (PCR) Program. [You can make your voice heard for free by donating $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a refund from the state. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/oJ47XcSlShk13ZZXxdtYHKLNZB1tDZyPYzTccZ4ei2Q=/vEngiRNLT7bdLgLKlumUDi_0LnMu4J9JTK7ooTznb_c=?refcode=012121) I've spent years on the frontlines of this fight to create a stronger, more inclusive democracy. Now, as a newly elected State Representative, I am honored to bring that experience to the Minnesota Capitol and to work with all of you to build a thriving Minnesota democracy. Thank you, Rep. | Hoosier Republican,

Indiana’s Congressional Delegation was recently sworn into the 117th Congress in Washington. We’re proud to have sent these Hoosiers to represent the hardworking men and women who make up our great state!

These Republicans have what it takes to fight for us and we wanted to give you a chance to know a little more about them.

**Jackie Walorski — 2nd Congressional District**
Jackie has represented the 2nd district since 2013 and is a lifelong Hoosier, born and raised in South Bend. She works hard toward common-sense solutions to grow our economy, strengthen national security, and care for our veterans.

**Jim Banks — 3rd Congressional District **
Jim is also a Hoosier native and veteran. Now serving in his third term, he is a proven conservative leader who has worked tirelessly to rebuild our military, secure better care for our veterans, cut taxes and grow our economy, protect the right to life and defend our religious liberty.

**Jim Baird — 4th Congressional District**
Jim is a lifelong resident of our 4th district, which he has been representing in Congress since 2019. He is also a Vietnam Veteran, a farmer, and small business owner for more than three decades.

**Victoria Spartz — 5th Congressional District**
Victoria just began her first term as a U.S. Representative, after winning the battleground 5th District this past November. She is the first Ukrainian-born member of the U.S. Congress and the first member born in a then-Soviet Republic.

**Greg Pence — 6th Congressional District**
Greg is entering his second term serving the 6th district, and vows to serve its constituents rather than serve special interests. He is a proud husband, grandfather, Marine, small businessman, and faith-driven conservative.

**Larry Bucshon — 8th Congressional District **
Dr. Larry Bucshon has served the 8th district since 2011. Prior to that, he spent 15 years as a practicing physician in the private sector, specializing in cardiothoracic surgery. Since elected, he has been a recognized leader in the fight to lower the cost of health care, and advance patients’ abilities and freedom to make their own health care decisions.

**Trey Hollingsworth — 9th Congressional District**
Trey is a successful business owner who has been serving the 9th district since 2017. He began renovating factories right out of college, and now owns a business that provides for more than one hundred families right here in Indiana. He supports the private sector, term limits, and shrinking government power over our day-to-day lives.

We are proud of our Representatives and are looking forward to supporting their service in the 117th Congress.

Thank you,

Kyle Hupfer, Chairman IN GOP

From: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action [jenny.beth@teapartypatriots.org]
To: Kevin Mooneyhan [newsletter@teapartypatriots.org]
Date: 1/18/2021 3:13 PM EST
**Subject: Please Help Us Serve You Better**
Kevin–

Tea Party Patriots Action is working on our plans for the next two and four years.

Please help tell us how Tea Party Patriots Action can better reach our goals, how you would suggest we approach election integrity, how can we better stand against the unconstitutional, un-American legislation that is sure to come out of Congress in the next 100+ days.

We are not giving up, and we are not giving in. We see how the radical left is trying to take advantage of the current unstable environment to press their agenda forward. We oppose their efforts to impeach President Trump. We oppose their efforts to silence and remove Members of Congress who used the Constitution and the law to make known their concerns over election integrity. We oppose Big Tech’s determination to silence conservative voices.

There are still things we can do peacefully within the system. We are working on an action plan for the next two years. These plans will include work to ensure the integrity of future elections, training future leaders so we can be wiser and more effective, and educating Americans on the harms of socialism and the radical left’s socialist agenda. Before finalizing such a plan, we want to hear from you.

[Would you please take a few minutes to fill out this form?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDIxLWRhYmIxMjUzNjU4ZDQyZTBhYmFiNDliYzE0ODQ5NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvamFudWFyeS0yMDIxLWFjdGl2aXN0LWZlZWRiYWNrLz9taWQ9NDMyOTAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=0UgKZ9PgXMt8n0Yl8YwxwQ)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Four Years Ago Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QBTyCduzc9lahWXbqWrlYtG_zP8thk5hnByZN9hvVvk=/HVAfiPEBqjRHphg8BWmvcAfay1jyNxtQLWugYHvFiwg=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210121-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Good afternoon, Peter.

What a good day it is!

The journey to yesterday was a long one, and for many people, it began four years ago when millions around the country and world marched.

Adam and I marched with our daughters, and the joy, resilience, humor, and peaceful beauty I saw on the streets of Washington, DC in 2017 gave me confidence in what an engaged, determined, and hopeful people could achieve.

Over four years, we saw marchers become engaged citizens, volunteers, advocates, candidates, and yes, elected public servants. And day by day and year by year, we made progress to get to yesterday.

It was a beautiful day to start a new chapter of hard work - the hard work we will do together as we remain committed to realizing our nation's promise of a more perfect union.

As I head back to the U.S. Capitol, I am reflecting on my memories of hope from that day and a sweet story that continues to bring me a smile. I hope it does the same for you.
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QBTyCduzc9lahWXbqWrlYtG_zP8thk5hnByZN9hvVvk=/HVAfiPEBqjRHphg8BWmvcAfay1jyNxtQLWugYHvFiwg=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210121-1-EM&amount=25)
I am honored to continue to serve the people of VA-07 and couldn't do it without the support of people like you. If you are able, please consider an early contribution to our campaign.

With appreciation,
Abigail

name: Rick Scott
subject: THIS is Biden's priority on Day 1?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Joe Biden's immigration plans are just the start. Democrats want to roll back Trump's historic tax cuts, defund the police, and expand the Supreme Court to move the bench to the Left. They can do it if they remain unchecked for the next 4 years!
Friend,

Have you seen this headline yet?

**Biden to propose sweeping immigration bill on first day in office**

Before even taking office, Joe Biden announced plans that champion a return to the failed Obama-era policies of the past.

Republicans worked so hard over the last four years to secure the border and fix the broken immigration system that was a product of 8 years of Obama and Biden. Now, all of our progress is on the chopping block and it's hard-working Americans and the millions of immigrants working their way through the legal immigration process who will be hurt most.

**We cannot win the fight to STOP Joe Biden and the Democrats ' destructive policies without control of the Senate. We need you to step up and join the fight today! name: Jay Inslee
subject: Biden's climate mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Help President Biden deliver on his mandate for bold climate action.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/308?t=3&akid=6116%2E53494%2ErhjBkB) Friend, It took years, but we did it. Today is Day One for Joe Biden, a president committed to defeating the climate crisis—in his inauguration address, in his policies, and in his soul. Joe Biden won the 2020 election with the most ambitious climate plans of any president in history and with the most votes of any president in history. That's a mandate if I ever saw one. [**Evergreen Action is going to be working every day to help President Biden deliver on that mandate. But they need your help to do this. Please donate today to invest in Evergreen's crucial work.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1541?t=4&akid=6116%2E53494%2ErhjBkB) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1547?t=5&akid=6116%2E53494%2ErhjBkB)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1548?t=6&akid=6116%2E53494%2ErhjBkB)

_"This is our moment."_ It's a phrase I took with me on the campaign trail in 2019 when I was running for president. Now, it's more true than ever. We'll make it through this tumultuous moment in our history not by retreating to some former era but by marching ahead with courage and clear eyes.
This is our moment to change our country for the better.
This is our moment to put Americans back to work building a just, inclusive clean energy economy that brings everyone into the fold.
This is our moment to defeat the climate crisis and give our children and grandchildren a future they can look forward to.
All across America—and especially in Washington, D.C.—the heat is on like never before. By putting people to work in good-paying jobs in a new clean energy economy, we can start to turn down the heat in our political climate and our physical climate all at once.
[**Evergreen Action has been leading the way to push bold climate investments to the top of America's agenda. They're so close to reaching their $10,000 fundraising goal by the end of Day One, so I've got to ask: Can you donate today to get them across the finish line?**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1541?t=11&akid=6116%2E53494%2ErhjBkB)
For the first time in years, we have a Democratic president and Congress. Comprehensive federal climate action—that many of you worked alongside me to help achieve—is finally possible. I know from experience the road ahead will not be easy, but I can tell you this: Evergreen Action will be there every step of the way to help President Biden deliver on his mandate for bold climate action.
This is Day One. Let's make the most of it.
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: ICYMI: Governor Holcomb’s State of the State Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, the state of our state is resilient and Indiana is in a position to take a massive leap forward in the year... _“For Indiana, the future is now, and the world continues to hear Indiana’s engines roar. That’s why I’m more excited than ever to work together to build a state of opportunity for all Hoosiers.”_ **\- Governor Eric Holcomb, 2020 State of the State** | |

Governor Holcomb delivered his virtual State of the State address to Hoosiers on Tuesday to highlight the challenges –– and the even greater opportunities –– facing our state in 2021.

>From expanding broadband infrastructure to fighting again for pregnancy accommodations for Hoosier moms in the workplace, the Governor laid out his bold vision for how Indiana can take a massive leap forward in the upcoming year.

**In case you missed it, we’ve got you covered below. You can also watch and share Governor Holcomb’s full address by clicking[here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=203694020d7e4940a9a37df45e3d6c18&_e=m7RaWo2mG--QdvHyzwY2e2XNvi6b9HleS3__UrqmMDwKHCOnoP7tiouaba65I1r-_nZ3D_17tP0-UWbBEeotfr6cCDale8GLZ-2I6yAgtn7Rzp_HI78xzPp0QcU6vmguA-X5vI0fGQVx7afFC7c6YXoZllRh77gcjTPt60uSal8xDnow1fvY0RpU49hPT-FPFlrxIiGO1gzgF_ZUrRMTN7XuoSfMUsNipCL_ZfKPIyUm5fw-cl4fJv9w5lHkkUWgtWsXudvn-0dee99s5Ust5YrgFA0qBfDvWahbTVG_sQ2mJAKI5OaXLFDP-Mmvo4nmXl1TzUrCrXAY9hWJW7d8Rrs2kxZrIdqxauTXGrhVMR6meo-DcLjtpsbYSAs21-rZMjnSSHuR9eo-09w1dPVNUXusCQO8Lq_EeinUPqIjfx4OFXZdWdNiUTSiHdp-gsi2Ln4xMJftyrcZ0ORxb0KWhk2OAMR-3qPrzihuQKn8esY%3D).**

**Governor Holcomb outlined Indiana’s strong financial standing which continues to defy all the odds and puts our state in a position to:**
* Increase K-12 funding by $377 million and restore higher education funding by $103 million in the coming year.
* Pay down $400 million of teacher pension debt.
* Pay off outstanding bonds and mortgages on I-69 and three state hospitals.

**Governor Holcomb doubled down on his commitment to making the Hoosier workforce stronger, more inclusive, and more prepared than ever before, including:**
* Building on the past successes of Indiana’s Workforce Ready and Employer Training Grant programs to fill thousands of open job positions.
* Governor Holcomb is again asking the General Assembly to pass pregnancy accommodations for expecting mothers.

**Governor Holcomb laid out a strong foundation for modernizing and strengthening Indiana’s infrastructure, including:**
* Completing I-69 from Evansville to Indianapolis, in addition to upgrading US Routes 30 and 31.
* Expanding on our Next Level Connections program that’s bringing rural broadband to underserved communities.
* Steaming ahead on two of the nation’s largest public transit rail projects.

**Governor Holcomb highlighted how Indiana’s investments in strong public health are paying dividends for Hoosiers:**
* Indiana’s infant mortality rate now stands at an all-time record low.
* Over 575,000 eligible Hoosiers have scheduled their COVID vaccines –– and you can too by calling 211 or visiting **[ourshot.in.gov](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=203694020d7e4940a9a37df45e3d6c18&_e=9wJ6M_V5IY44W2CCFVXk_5hGf9R7VmSZ97wSCBl9orut-f9_Gjevd2qyAJmWhhhPYzSCXGCNfBOXg86oo0Jz6cQfETKQoiXNgkZIYjsjFP6NMWbs2nlGJiCcaDuDeO7idmy26fVQKozglCEAOLy0CCNgJMpZp_JmuO_xi1UWWdIfb7sFUB5iGU-KtaMaxlagL4b3nrgKh-KEEJmUwrol7A4SQV_PhHP1zDO_N-knamrLYeAVAWiSJERVb23MQH303nKBosWJiwrA3iKjbV6L6m3n3r4jKbl2RuBseo5IV63ylEPW_O4k6mrZ7V4CZBVf_PgVj47OZhf-ReZ_ZfR_CGfanWCN-XJxPcAkcEJY32jyHbHUX801CA0Tb3q9qrYLVt3inKxbVbnS34nzuuEQRf7JonVUAT-P5IKA7en1TdNLyLIXej1U0wZQAhO1v0dM4oYmdHiQ2w91C4BwIrU5WA%3D%3D)**.
* Indiana now leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care.

**To close out his speech, Governor Holcomb emphasized the need to modernize our state government so that it works for all Hoosiers by:**
* Outfitting all state police officers with body cameras.
* Appointing our state’s first Chief Equity, Inclusion, and Opportunity Officer to improve diversity outcomes across state government.
* Getting Indiana’s diversity dashboard up and running as well as completing an outside review of our state’s law enforcement agencies and academies.

Friend, despite all the challenges and roadblocks that 2020 threw at us, there’s plenty of reasons for Hoosiers to be hopeful for a stronger, safer, and more stable tomorrow here in Indiana.

We’re glad that you’re on board, and we look forward to continuing our work together to build One Indiana for All.
[**Watch and Share Governor Holcomb's 2021 State of the State Address**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=203694020d7e4940a9a37df45e3d6c18&_e=m7RaWo2mG--QdvHyzwY2e2XNvi6b9HleS3__UrqmMDwKHCOnoP7tiouaba65I1r-_nZ3D_17tP0-UWbBEeotfr6cCDale8GLZ-2I6yAgtn7Rzp_HI78xzPp0QcU6vmguA-X5vI0fGQVx7afFC7c6YXoZllRh77gcjTPt60uSal8xDnow1fvY0RpU49hPT-FPFlrxIiGO1gzgF_ZUrRMTN7XuoSfMUsNipCL_ZfKPIyUm5fw-cl4fJv9w5lHkkUWgtWsXudvn-0dee99s5Ust5RbWuMjG7T6uqb02cMsib2kluFVBqtQ3krOmSYR5qORqZjfILVX1WB_tLBYiHhExS9XXwQ-CS-gVWdTv84uSZPA454oWJcgnY7gnT2IQpxjp2XoPkh3u41ZrPofPosx4cqOuEcihzvXhJOfzzzTlgINLemJNmrRL8MB5lqrSWXkJGQomBSIeeKS3S3nVpsaFIies3KnFpRh9Hm_OwOLu2Nw%3D)
Thank you,

Holcomb Crew

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Challenging Washington’s culture of corruption
body:
Judicial Watch’s work is exploding in volume and growing in historic importance. In just the past few weeks, for example...

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch's work is _exploding in volume and growing in historic importance_. _In just the past few weeks_ , for example...

* We _forced the release_ of 210 pages of records from the State Department showing that in 2017 then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch warned of corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Yet in her 2019 testimony in the House impeachment proceedings against then-President Trump, she told lawmakers she knew little about Burisma...that she only learned of its connections to the Biden family through "press reports." _Ambassador Yovanovitch clearly knew more about Burisma than she testified to before Congress_!
* We _forced the release_ of an additional 38 pages of records from State showing that a senior Obama State Department official said he was told by a senior Ukraine Prosecutor that he was offered "high-level" access to Hillary Clinton's 2016 presidential campaign by the same Democratic lobbying firm that worked for Burisma Holdings. _This "smoking gun" email ties Hunter Biden's Burisma work to an influence-peddling operation involving the_ _Clinton presidential campaign_ ...which the Deep State wanted to cover up!

* We just _sued_ seven federal agencies for records of former Obama administration officials requesting to "unmask" retired Lt. General Michael Flynn, then-President Trump's first National Security Advisor. _These "unmasking" requests show the Deep State's total commitment to destroying Donald Trump's_ _presidency_.

The need to police our elected and non-elected officials never ends...
Because the truth is that politicians in _either_ party or secretive government bureaucrats cannot police themselves - it just does not work! That's why no one is working harder than Judicial Watch to challenge Washington's culture of corruption.
But we can do this essential work because... _and only because_ ...of the generous support we receive from patriotic Americans like you.
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjExODEzMDM=)_** , we can and are refusing to let corrupt politicians like Joe Biden or Hillary Clinton off the hook just because they won or lost an election.
_Nor will we let Deep State officials within our federal agencies escape accountability for undermining our Constitution_! When they refuse to comply with our nation's open records laws or violate other statutes, we challenge them in the courts. And since Congress is completely untrustworthy in its oversight role, we will most certainly conduct more investigations and file more lawsuits in 2021.
Indeed, we have a lot of hard work ahead this year...
We are also leading the way challenging illegal state and local sanctuary policies that cripple immigration law enforcement...including our historic lawsuits challenging truly _deadly_ sanctuary policies in San Francisco and Santa Clara County, California.
_This work is critically important now as big changes are coming_.
Joe Biden's arrival in the White House and Trump's departure is sending a powerful message to those seeking to enter the United States illegally...the door that was closed will soon be open!
But not if we have anything to say about it (and we do - plenty)!
**Because Judicial Watch 's independent watchdog work leaves Congress **
**and the liberal Big Media in the dust ...and _we prove that every day_!**
But these battles are expensive...
...and we don't have the deep pockets of the government to fund our independent investigations, litigation and public education...instead, we rely on you and other conservative Americans who share our commitment to upholding the rule of law.
**_[That's why I hope you will make your best contribution today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjExODEzMDM=)_**. _With your support our work can literally change the course of history_.
Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton
President
Judicial Watch

subject: Today at 4PM ET, DNC Winter Meeting...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-** **We hope that you had as great and celebratory a day as we did. From the Biden-Harris inauguration to our three newest members of the U.S. Senate being sworn in, history and herstory were made. Democracy prevailed--what a feeling!!! ** **And look at all that took place on day one of this new administration. President Biden wasted no time getting to work for the American people. He signed over a dozen executive actions yesterday to undo some of the damage of the Trump administration and combat the coronavirus pandemic, with more action to come. ** **We will share a recap at the end of the week. ** **In the meantime, we wanted to extend an invitation to join us today for the DNC Winter Meeting at 4pm ET. The DNC will vote for its officers for the 2021-2025 term. ** **The officer positions, as provided in Article Three, Section 2 of the Charter, are listed below. These positions are required to be equally divided as practical. Please click [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9757af3a3d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to join today’s meeting. The link will go live closer to the start of the meeting around 4PM ET.**
* **Chair**
* **Vice Chair of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection **
* **Vice Chair**
* **Vice Chair**
* **Vice Chair**
* **Vice Chair & ASDC President (elected by ASDC)**
* **Secretary**
* **Treasurer**
* **National Finance Chair**

**President Biden’s Announced Slate For DNC Leadership** **Last week President Biden announced his slate for new Democratic National Committee officer positions, including the announcement of Jaime Harrison for DNC Chair. ** ** ** **The officer announcements were: **
* **Jaime Harrison, Chair**
* **Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms, Vice Chair of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection **
* **Governor Gretchen Whitmer, Vice Chair**
* **Senator Tammy Duckworth, Vice Chair**
* **Rep. Filemon Vela Jr., Vice Chair**
* **Vice Chair & ASDC President (elected by ASDC)**
* **Jason Rae, Secretary**
* **Virginia McGregor, Treasurer**
* **Chris Korge, National Finance Chair**

**These individuals represent the best of the Democratic Party. Their personal experiences and long histories of activism reflect our party’s values and the diversity that makes us so strong.** **Yours in the Fight,** **Mũthoni**

| | | |
---
| | | | Peter,

Congresswoman Liz Cheney (R-WY) has a history of supporting budget-busting spending bills and endless foreign wars, but her recent decision to support the second impeachment of President Donald Trump was the most brazen betrayal of our principles yet.

"The President of the United States summoned this mob, and lit the flame of this attack," said Cheney regarding the recent Capitol Hill violence. "Everything that followed was his doing."

Nevermind, of course, the fact that President Trump specifically urged everyone to demonstrate "_**peacefully**_."

**The question now is: Should Liz Cheney be allowed to remain in House GOP leadership?**

[**Tell us what you think.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=bc9d7dece9&e=b2c16e6198)

“She should resign her position as a conference chair and should not be serving this conference," said House Freedom Caucus Chairman Andy Biggs (R-AZ).

“I think she’s totally wrong. I think there should be a conference and have a second vote on [her leadership post]," said Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH).

“She is weakening our conference at a key moment for personal political gain and is unfit to lead. She must step down as conference chair,” said Congressman Matt Rosendale (R-MT).

These conservatives understand how harmful it is to have someone in a leadership position who betrays our core principles and all of the people who worked so hard to elect Republicans.

**What do you think?**

[**Take our short membership survey and let us know if you think Republicans should excuse Cheney's actions or take steps to remove her from the party's leadership.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=bc9c07d187&e=b2c16e6198)

Conservatives will now face an onslaught of liberal proposals from the Biden Administration and the Pelosi-Schumer Congress, and Republicans must have rock-solid conservative leadership to stop these dangerous policies.

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help build and strengthen the House Freedom Caucus.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting the radical Left and sellout Republicans and trying to take back the GOP! [Now more than ever, it's important that you join me in that fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)!

**_I AM APPALLED AT THE SWAMPY REPUBLICANS! _**These people were led into power by Trump, some of them in 2020, only to stab him in the back when the chips were down!

Last week, it was Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and Mitt Romney. They are all first in line to get primaried.

But the Swamp problem was so much worse than we thought. It really WAS Trump vs the Uniparty!

The latest one we need to get rid of: Cocaine Mitch! Yahoo! News reports:

_Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell on Tuesday explicitly blamed President Donald Trump for instigating the riot at the US Capitol on January 6._

_"The mob was fed lies," the GOP leader said on the Senate floor. "They were provoked by the president and other powerful people."_

_The Kentucky Republican's rebuke came as Trump faces an impeachment trial in the Senate over the Capitol siege. McConnell is said to be leaning toward voting to convict Trump, as he thinks impeachment could help to "purge" him from the GOP, The New York Times reported last week._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)
---

So McConnell thinks he can purge us. He must REALLY be on cocaine if he thinks HE is the majority in the party instead of US!

The one thing Trump taught us, was that if we stand together, we are stronger than the Swamp- and we can beat them!

The Surrender Caucus hates us. It's personal to them. So let's humiliate them by taking away their precious power and beating them in primaries with good America First candidates!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)
---

**President Trump never surrendered. He fought the Swamp to the end!**

McConnell is just the worst. We need to take out as many of his trusted lieutenants as we possibly can to take away his power. Let's force him from leadership!

The path is clear. We have to evict these treasonous Republicans and elect America First conservatives! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. We aren't grifters. We just fight Socialists and their Republican enablers.

**We will fight Mitch and his corrupt toadies.[Help us fight for the Republic!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)**

_They won't see the light. So let's make them feel the heat!_

We want REAL America First Republican leaders. NOT Mitch. NOT Liz Cheney. [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)

Your contribution is so crucial. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)- NO MORE UNIPARTY!

Let's elect pro-Trump MAGA leaders. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)!

Folks, when a barn is rotten the best thing is to burn it down & rebuild. We will get rid of the bad Republicans and replace them with members of our movement, true believers like Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Who does Liz Cheney think she is?

OUR BOSS! Well she is going to find out in 2022 we are HER BOSS & she is FIRED! It’s time to use our Primary for what God intended: throwing out those that abuse our trust & good faith! Liz Cheney is Swamp. You & I are NOT! Help us DRAIN IT!

[Donate now.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)

Respectfully,
[ ](secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1)

Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control Congress and God only knows what they will do. [Donate right now to help us fight for America.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fzuRLZxwVrcqI4c&b=aA5d9GpOf480QwDAf6CLGQ)
